deviations.description: The requirement in Version 2 obligates that information on the nature of blood donations is provided to all donors before consent, whereas the process model only provides this information to first-time donors. The process does not provide this information to repeat donors before consent, resulting in non-compliance.
process_model_reference: Provide information of the nature of the blood donations

deviations.description: The modification of the activity name from 'provide_information_nature_of_blood_donations' to 'provide_information_on_nature_of_blood_donations' does not affect the process model, as the BPMN task name already matches the intent of both versions.
process_model_reference: Provide information of the nature of the blood donations
